prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 photorealistic cinematic travel portrait of two young East Asian women in elegant fantasy hanfu-inspired warrior robes kneeling at a stone ledge in a sunny European plaza, studying an unfolded paper map together. The left woman wears a pale icy-blue flowing robe with darker blue trim, ornate silver bracers, delicate embroidered patterns, dangling earrings, and a high half-up black hairstyle decorated with intricate silver hair ornaments; she smiles softly while looking down and pointing at the map. The right woman wears a deep navy and charcoal robe with blue inner layers, silver embroidered trim, ornate silver forearm guards, small earrings, a black updo with hairpins, and a white forehead mark; she laughs brightly while pointing at the same map. Count exactly 2 main characters and 1 unfolded map. Place them in the foreground from the waist up, close to the camera, with hands and fingers visible on the map. In the background, center a grand historic stone church facade resembling the Ruins of Saint Paul in Macau, with tall columns, arched openings, carved statues, a triangular pediment, and a small cross at the top; include broad stone steps, sunlit paving, potted plants, street lamps, distant pedestrians, and low European-style buildings on both sides. Use natural daylight, clear blue sky, soft shadows, realistic fabric texture, detailed silver ornamentation, shallow depth of field with the women sharp and the background slightly softened, vertical smartphone composition, documentary realism mixed with subtle xianxia fantasy styling. Add a small semi-transparent bottom-center watermark reading 蓝心 | 蓝心 AI. Avoid extra characters in the foreground, avoid distorted hands, avoid modern clothing on the two women, and keep the church facade fully recognizable behind them.
